- https://grantfoster.dev/profile.json — person profile
- https://grantfoster.dev/projects.json — project directory

## Identity
- Name: Grant Foster
- Role: AI Staff Engineer
- Mission: I am on a mission to build the world's first trillion-dollar, single-person LLC. With a focus on Bittensor as a miner & operator, I specialize in agentic-powered backends and distributed infrastructure.  I develop AI trading systems, self-improving UI's, and the experiments in between.
- Domain: grantfoster.dev
- Company: https://bimross.com

## Focus
- Trillion-dollar single-person LLC (mission)
- Bittensor mining and operations
- Agentic backends and distributed infrastructure
- AI trading systems and product experimentation
